title: EoE deleted Rei scene
wikitext:
[]: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by AWinters » Wed Aug 12, 2020 10:56 pm Someone mentioned to me that the scene where Gendo tries to merge with Rei has a part missing that's essential to the plot. He said the part isn't in 'most' releases, but I could find out about it online. He wasn't sure which version has the complete scene. I saw another mention of it on a forum while searching, but it only said it was something to do with Rei before Gendo tried to merge with her. Couldn't find anything else. Anyone know what this is referring to, please?

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 13, 2020 12:07 am There are no missing EoE scenes. Not in the sense that you're talking about. There are different versions of the movie, but the differences don't involve entire scenes going missing. (Unless you count a next episode preview showing the Gainax office a scene.) Somebody's pulling a fast one on you.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by Melkor » Thu Aug 13, 2020 12:51 am Maybe you're misremembering the scene where Gendo inserts the Adam embryo into Rei? Perhaps that scene was censored in whatever version they saw.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Aug 13, 2020 3:44 am Or maybe he's referring to the mistranslation in which Misato wrongly tells Shinji that humans have spawned from Adam or some other lore stuff

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Sat Aug 15, 2020 7:08 pm As far as I know, EoE is complete, there's nothing missing that Anno wished he had done. Yes there are scrapped ideas like the scene where Toji has recovered enough that he's teaching himself to play wheelchair basketball, but there aren't scenes that just weren't done that, for all intents and purposes, should have been. The only thing I can think of is either Melkor's explanation that maybe he was talking about the fucked up child boob fusion shots, or the shot of Rei looking at the destroyed Dummy Plug plant when Gendo finds her to take her to Central Dogma and fuse, since I personally totally forget about that shot until I'm watching it. More details would be great if you could get them, after the DVD menu thing with the pornstar appearing for a few seconds out of nowhere on an Australian copy of Collection 0:7, and the release of the AIDS radio PSA done by the English VAs who voiced Shinji and Asuka, I'd love to dive into another real world Eva mystery.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by AWinters » Sat Aug 15, 2020 7:49 pm AdamMalkovitch wrote: As far as I know, EoE is complete, there's nothing missing that Anno wished he had done. Yes there are scrapped ideas like the scene where Toji has recovered enough that he's teaching himself to play wheelchair basketball, but there aren't scenes that just weren't done that, for all intents and purposes, should have been. The only thing I can think of is either Melkor's explanation that maybe he was talking about the fucked up child boob fusion shots, or the shot of Rei looking at the destroyed Dummy Plug plant when Gendo finds her to take her to Central Dogma and fuse, since I personally totally forget about that shot until I'm watching it. More details would be great if you could get them, after the DVD menu thing with the pornstar appearing for a few seconds out of nowhere on an Australian copy of Collection 0:7, and the release of the AIDS radio PSA done by the English VAs who voiced Shinji and Asuka, I'd love to dive into another real world Eva mystery.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat Aug 15, 2020 7:51 pm ^On a related note, there is an outtake in the Manga Entertainment dub where Gendo's VA during the fusion scene had the character wondering where his car keys were as moved his hand inside Rei.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by AWinters » Sat Aug 15, 2020 7:54 pm cyharding#896588 wrote: ^On a related note, there is an outtake in the Manga Entertainment dub where Gendo's VA during the fusion scene had the character wondering where his car keys were as moved his hand inside Rei.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Aug 15, 2020 9:07 pm cy, do you happen to have a clip of that outtake laying around somewhere? I really want to see that now

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 15, 2020 11:35 pm cyharding wrote: ^On a related note, there is an outtake in the Manga Entertainment dub where Gendo's VA during the fusion scene had the character wondering where his car keys were as moved his hand inside Rei.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Aug 16, 2020 12:07 am Reichu wrote: There are no outtakes on the DVD, and Gendo's VA didn't participate in the commentary either. You're probably misremembering a joke from the audio commentary by AWL, Jason Lee, and Taliesin Jaffe.

[]: Re: EoE deleted Rei scene?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 16, 2020 12:17 am I honestly can't remember the context there, myself. I guess if I have any point at all, it's that you made it sound like there were outtakes on the DVD we could listen to ourselves, when at most it's just AWL imitating a joke MacAvery made during recording.
